blank
An empty grid
Start from nothing. Place your own first thoughts.
open inquiry
A central question
One question at the centre, room for observations and evidence to gather around it.
decision
A fork in progress
Two options, observations under each, a tension between them. For when you have a choice to make.
pattern-finding
Several observations
For when you've already noticed things and want to see what they add up to.

Preview the prompt
This is exactly what would be sent to an LLM if you clicked synthesise once we wire one in. You can copy it and paste it into Claude.ai or another model right now to see what kind of output the prompt actually produces.
